spec.objective: Author internal/subagent/codex/doc.go (package-level doc referencing D-C1 layering pattern and the 'openai' vendor sentinel) and internal/subagent/codex/client.go (Client struct, Options, New constructor, NewWithExec test-seam — mirroring the anthropic package's constructor shape exactly). These are the zero-dependency foundation pieces that run.go and the Dockerfile both import.
